finalized_plan.description: Use the search_agent to find a list of articles published in Nature’s Scientific Reports conference proceedings from 2012
Identify among those articles the candidate article that did not mention the terms “plasmons” or “plasmonics” by reviewing its title, abstract, or keywords
Retrieve the full text or a detailed summary of that candidate article using an appropriate tool or verified online source
Verify by scanning the content (using text search techniques) that the article indeed makes no reference to “plasmons” or “plasmonics.”
Extract from the article the name of the nano-compound that was studied, ensuring not to include any “nano” prefix in the final designation
Cross-check the extracted compound name with the established criteria to fully verify accuracy
Provide the final answer using the final_answer tool

root_cause_reasoning: The search agent was not successfully invoked, and the agent subsequently fabricated the answer in Step 2
